calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Craig Murdock, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Plaintiff represented to the court that the case has settled. The Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to May-03-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-15-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
